title: ParCool!
description: A Minecraft Forge Mod for Cool actions like Parkour
body:
![ParCool Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab03f75024d028dd4ded3f86693d55fdeefe71ef.png)
# _A Minecraft Forge Mod for more **Cool** actions like **Parkour.**_

[![Github Link](https://badgen.net/badge/icon/GitHub?icon=github&label)](https://github.com/alRex-U/ParCool) [![Discord Badge](https://badgen.net/badge/icon/Discord%20%7C%20ATK%20Studios?icon=discord&label)](https://discord.com/invite/NbAJwj8RHg) ![Mod Loader Badge](https://badgen.net/badge/Mod%20Loader/Forge%20%7C%20NeoForge/red) [![Curse Forge](https://badgen.net/badge/Link/Curse%20Forge/orange)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/parcool) ![Supported Versions](https://badgen.net/badge/Now%20Available%20For/1.16.5%20%7C%201.18.2%20%7C%201.19.2%20%7C%201.20.4%20%7C%201.21%20~%201.21.4/green)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/yd8yR_lIz_A" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Uploaded by _**Juisader**_. Thanks!

## 📌 Features
- Breakfall
- Cling To Cliff
- Crawl
- Dodge
- Dive
- Fast Run
- Flipping
- Hang Down
- Horizontal Wall Run
- Sliding
- Safety Tap
- Vault
- Wall Jump
- and more!

## 🚶 Smooth animations for each action

Each actions have their own smooth animation.

![Animation Demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48dcb5c09c4c729ad2149963561f218d526b3c3e.png)

## 🛠️ High Customizability with many configurations

This mod contains even some features supporting mod-packers and server-hosts!  
Press Alt+P key to open setting menu in game.

## 📖 Tutorial guidebook

You can read ParCool guidebook on [Github](https://github.com/alRex-U/ParCool/blob/main/docs/parcool-guide-on-web-latest/Introduction.md).  
By installing Patchouli mod, you can read the guidebook in-game.

## 📚 Additional Mods Support

- [Patchouli](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/patchouli) for in-game guidebook. (It needs 1 book and 3 feathers to craft)
- [Feathers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/feathers) of Elenai Dodge 2 as one of Stamina systems. (for 1.18.2~1.19.4)
- [Paragliders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paragliders) as one of Stamina systems (only for mc-1.20.1).
- [EpicFight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-fight-mod) as one of Stamina systems (for 1.19.2~1.20.1).
- [BetterThirdPerson](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-third-person) for bugfixes (Caution : This dependency is experimental, possibly still haing bugs)
- [ShoulderSurfingReloaded](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/shoulder-surfing-reloaded) for bugfixes (Caution : This dependency is experimental possibly still having bugs)

These dependencies are Optional. ParCool can work well without installing these mods.

## I hope you enjoy running around the Minecraft world!

---
